title: Toast
method: Spread butter immediately while hot so it melts in.

title: Steamed Rice
method: Rinse rice until water runs clear.
Add to pot with water and salt, bring to a boil.
Cover and simmer on the lowest heat for 12 minutes.
Rest off heat for 5 minutes before fluffing.

title: Baked Chips
method: Cut potatoes into wedges, toss with oil and salt.
Spread on a baking tray in a single layer.
Bake 35-40 minutes, turning halfway, until golden and crisp.

title: Orange Pasta
method: Add mushroom and diced garlic, don't fry too long.
Add tomatoes, cream, and beef stock.
Lid on or add water to keep it wet — soak up and boil off most of the liquid.
